name: Uncooked Plum Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Grapenuts or rolled graham crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water.
2. Dissolve softened gelatin in boiling water.
3. Add all ingredients except egg whites to the gelatin mixture and stir thoroughly.
4. Chill until partially set.
5. Gently fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into a long, shallow pan.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Cut the pudding into squares using a sharp knife.
9. Serve with whipped cream.
10. Makes 8 servings.
Mrs. E.B. Douglas, Anderson, IN.
